title: Dressrosa’s Hidden System Emerges
description: Pages 13–16 focus on dressrosa’s hidden system emerges, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Doflamingo, Franky, Rebecca, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Unknown person #13 as the dwarves of Green Bit draw Usopp and Robin into their rebellion, believing Usopp is the legendary hero who will save them.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Are the favored fighters these three!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Shut up and keep going!! We'll talk there!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Wanna get found by the police!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: So you really went and entered ...

dialogue.speaker: Rebecca
dialogue.text: I...!! I can do it!! I can win!! Soldier-san!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: ...!! a crying warrior wins no tour-naments!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: That's why I'm telling you to hurry !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Has things he wishes to protect....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I'll explain later!!! But you have to get off that island, now!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Peru Peru Peru Peru Peru Peru Peru Peru Peru Peru Peru Peru Peru Peru Peru

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Until the appointed Caesar- Exchange time!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Even if you turn over Caesar, there isn't going to be any sort of deal!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: We've fallen right into a trap!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: BLACK LEG-YA... DID YOU FIND THE FACTORY?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: It's not about that!! Listen carefully!! You've got to get away from there quickly....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I'm about to hand over Caesar

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: All squads, head for the southeast beach...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I did... it's too late now ....

summary: Pages 13–16 focus on dressrosa’s hidden system emerges, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
